documents_available: Tax returns (2 yrs), Business tax returns (1120S), CPA-signed P&L, Bank statements (12 mo), Purchase agreement, ID
edge_case_flags: Edge Case: Self-employed — different doc requirements; DTI at 40% (soft hurdle); High income + high loan amount
decision_rationale: Edge Case: Self-employed requires business returns + CPA P&L (not W-2). Score 728 is good. DTI exactly at soft hurdle boundary (40%). Must verify income averaging over 2 yrs. 9 months reserves is moderate. Escalate to senior underwriter.

documents_available: Pay stubs (FT only), W-2 (FT), Tax return (1 yr gig income),  ID
edge_case_flags: Edge Case: Gig income counted as self-employed. FT income alone gives DTI ~50%+. Gig income needs 2yr history.
decision_rationale: Edge Case: FT income (DTI 50% using only FT portion) exceeds 40% limit for personal loans. Gig income (Swiggy) could be included but requires 2-year tax history — applicant has only 1 year. If gig income can be verified, combined income lowers DTI to ~35% (acceptable). Requires manual income review.

documents_available: Tax returns (2 yrs), Business returns, CPA P&L, Bank statements (12 mo), ID
edge_case_flags: Edge Case: High income, very high debt (two existing mortgages + business loans). DTI 60% exceeds hard limit.
decision_rationale: DTI 60% exceeds 50% hard ceiling for FHA and 43% conventional maximum. No compensating factor can override DTI > 50%. Despite strong credit score (765) and large down payment (20%), hard DTI cap is an absolute limit per Section 6.4.

documents_available: Pay stubs, W-2, Tax returns, H1B visa (3 yrs remaining), I-94, ID
edge_case_flags: Edge Case: Non-citizen on H-1B — visa validity check required. Visa has 3 years remaining, loan term 60 months — GAP flagged.
decision_rationale: Edge Case: H-1B visa valid 3 more years but auto loan term requested = 72 months (6 yrs). AFB requires visa validity ≥ loan term. Applicant must reduce term to 36 months or below, OR provide I-140 approval (green card pending) as continuity evidence. All other criteria excellent.

documents_available: Pay stubs, W-2 (2 yrs), Tax returns (2 yrs), Bank statements, ID
edge_case_flags: Loan purpose is business — personal loan cannot be used for business investment per AFB policy
decision_rationale: Loan purpose violation: AFB personal loans are restricted to personal use. Using personal loan proceeds for business startup capital (commercial purpose) is prohibited under AFB lending policy and potentially violates Reg Z. Applicant should apply for a small business loan through AFB Business Banking.
